meaning: n.鹅卵石,<美口>小招牌(尤指医生或律师挂的营业招牌)
examples: She hung out her shingle under the name Designs by Pamela.
The industry isn't regulated, so anybody can hang out a shingle.
He scraped away the dirt, and exposed a pine shingle.
Asphalt shingles also have varying expected maximum life spans, depending on the quality of the shingle.
True, the back had been customised as a cedar-shingle hut, complete with a crooked stove-pipe.
